[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000100 1
6 000000100 1
7 110000110 4

12 21 110000110 4 match 7
23 32 100001100 3

56 65 100101100 4
67 76 100101100 4
70 07 000000100 1 match 5 6
